# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.

Prevent insecure file upload vulnerabilities.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Secure User File Upload
 * Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents securely
 * Version: 1.0
 * Author: Your Name
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class Secure_User_File_Upload {
    
    private $upload_dir;
    private $allowed_types = array(
        'image/jpeg' => 'jpg',
        'image/png' => 'png',
        'image/gif' => 'gif',
        'application/pdf' => 'pdf',
        'application/msword' => 'doc',
        'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document' => 'docx'
    );
    
    private $max_file_size = 5242880; // 5MB
    
    public function __construct() {
        $wp_upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $this->upload_dir = $wp_upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files/';
        
        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_shortcode('user_file_upload', array($this, 'upload_form_shortcode'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_sufu_upload_file', array($this, 'handle_file_upload'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_sufu_delete_file', array($this, 'handle_file_delete'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_sufu_get_files', array($this, 'get_user_files'));
    }
    
    public function init() {
        if (!file_exists($this->upload_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($this->upload_dir);
            
            $htaccess_content = "Options -Indexes\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "<FilesMatch \"\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|gif|pdf|doc|docx)$\">\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Order Allow,Deny\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Allow from all\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "</FilesMatch>\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "<FilesMatch \"\\.(php|php3|php4|php5|phtml|pl|py|jsp|asp|sh|cgi)$\">\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Order Allow,Deny\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Deny from all\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "</FilesMatch>\n";
            
            file_put_contents($this->upload_dir . '.htaccess', $htaccess_content);
            
            file_put_contents($this->upload_dir . 'index.php', '<?php // Silence is golden');
        }
        
        $this->create_user_files_table();
    }
    
    private function create_user_files_table() {
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        
        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS $table_name (
            id bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            user_id bigint(20) NOT NULL,
            file_name varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            file_type varchar(50) NOT NULL,
            file_path varchar(500) NOT NULL,
            file_size bigint(20) NOT NULL,
            upload_date datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            KEY user_id (user_id)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
    }
    
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_style('sufu-styles', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'assets/style.css', array(), '1.0');
        wp_enqueue_script('sufu-script', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'assets/script.js', array('jquery'), '1.0', true);
        
        wp_localize_script('sufu-script', 'sufu_ajax', array(
            'ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce' => wp_create_nonce('sufu_nonce')
        ));
    }
    
    public function upload_form_shortcode() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="sufu-container">
            <div class="sufu-upload-section">
                <h3>Upload Files</h3>
                <form id="sufu-upload-form" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                    <div class="sufu-form-group">
                        <label for="sufu-file-type">File Type:</label>
                        <select id="sufu-file-type" name="file_type" required>
                            <option value="">Select Type</option>
                            <option value="profile_picture">Profile Picture</option>
                            <option value="document">Document</option>
                            <option value="other">Other</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="sufu-form-group">
                        <label for="sufu-file-input">Choose File:</label>
                        <input type="file" id="sufu-file-input" name="user_file" required>
                        <small>Allowed: JPG, PNG, GIF, PDF, DOC, DOCX (Max 5MB)</small>
                    </div>
                    <button type="submit" class="sufu-btn">Upload File</button>
                </form>
                <div id="sufu-message"></div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="sufu-files-section">
                <h3>Your Files</h3>
                <div id="sufu-files-list">
                    <p>Loading...</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
    
    public function handle_file_upload() {
        check_ajax_referer('sufu_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'You must be logged in to upload files.'));
        }
        
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        
        if (!isset($_FILES['user_file']) || $_FILES['user_file']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'File upload error. Please try again.'));
        }
        
        $file = $_FILES['user_file'];
        $file_type = sanitize_text_field($_POST['file_type']);
        
        if (empty($file_type)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Please select a file type.'));
        }
        
        if ($file['size'] > $this->max_file_size) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'File size exceeds 5MB limit.'));
        }
        
        if ($file['size'] == 0) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'File is empty.'));
        }
        
        $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mime_type = finfo_file($finfo, $file['tmp_name']);
        finfo_close($finfo);
        
        if (!array_key_exists($mime_type, $this->allowed_types)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'File type not allowed.'));
        }
        
        $file_extension = $this->allowed_types[$mime_type];
        $original_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
        $path_info = pathinfo($original_name);
        $uploaded_extension = strtolower($path_info['extension']);
        
        if ($uploaded_extension !== $file_extension) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'File extension does not match file type.'));
        }
        
        $file_content = file_get_contents($file['tmp_name']);
        
        if ($this->contains_php_code($file_content)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'File contains suspicious content.'));
        }
        
        if (in_array($mime_type, array('image/jpeg', 'image/png', 'image/gif'))) {
            $image_info = getimagesize($file['tmp_name']);
            if ($image_info === false) {
                wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Invalid image file.'));
            }
        }
        
        $user_dir = $this->upload_dir . $user_id . '/';
        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
        }
        
        $unique_filename = uniqid() . '_' . time() . '.' . $file_extension;
        $destination = $user_dir . $unique_filename;
        
        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Failed to save file.'));
        }
        
        chmod($destination, 0644);
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';
        
        $wpdb->insert(
            $table_name,
            array(
                'user_id' => $user_id,
                'file_name' => $original_name,
                'file_type' => $file_type,
                'file_path' => $unique_filename,
                'file_size' => $file['size']
            ),
            array('%d', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%d')
        );
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'File uploaded successfully!'));
    }
    
    private function contains_php_code($content) {
        $suspicious_patterns = array(
            '/<\?php/i',
            '/<\?=/i',
            '/<\?/i',
            '/<script/i',
            '/eval\s*\(/i',
            '/base64_decode/i',
            '/exec\s*\(/i',
            '/system\s*\(/i',
            '/passthru\s*\(/i',
            '/shell_exec/i',
            '/assert\s*\(/i',
            '/preg_replace.*\/e/i'
        );
        
        foreach ($suspicious_patterns as $pattern) {
            if (preg_match($pattern, $content)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    public function get_user_files() {
        check_ajax_referer('sufu_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'You must be logged in.'));
        }
        
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';
        
        $files = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE user_id = %d ORDER BY upload_date DESC",
            $user_id
        ));
        
        $wp_upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $base_url = $wp_upload_dir['baseurl'] . '/user-files/' . $user_id . '/';
        
        $files_data = array();
        foreach ($files as $file) {
            $files_data[] = array(
                'id' => $file->id,
                'name' => $file->file_name,
                'type' => $file->file_type,
                'size' => size_format($file->file_size),
                'date' => date('M j, Y', strtotime($file->upload_date)),
                'url' => $base_url . $file->file_path
            );
        }
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('files' => $files_data));
    }
    
    public function handle_file_delete() {
        check_ajax_referer('sufu_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'You must be logged in.'));
        }
        
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $file_id = intval($_POST['file_id']);
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'user_uploaded_files';
        
        $file = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM $table_name WHERE id = %d AND user_id = %d",
            $file_id,
            $user_id
        ));
        
        if (!$file) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'File not found or access denied.'));
        }
        
        $file_path = $this->upload_dir . $user_id . '/' . $file->file_path;
        
        if (file_exists($file_path)) {
            unlink($file_path);
        }
        
        $wpdb->delete($table_name, array('id' => $file_id, 'user_id' => $user_id), array('%d', '%d'));
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'File deleted successfully.'));
    }
}

new Secure_User_File_Upload();

if (!is_dir(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'assets')) {
    mkdir(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'assets', 0755, true);
}

if (!file_exists(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'assets/style.css')) {
    $css = '.sufu-container {
    max-width: 800px;
    margin: 20px auto;
    padding: 20px;
}

.sufu-upload-section, .sufu-files-section {
    background: #fff;
    padding: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 5px;
}

.sufu-form-group {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
}

.sufu-form-group label {
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    font-weight: bold;
}

.sufu-form-group input[type="file"],
.sufu-form-group select {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 8px;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 3px;
}

.sufu-form-group small {
    display: block;
    margin-top: 5px;
    color: #666;
}

.sufu-btn {
    background: #0073aa;
    color: #fff;
    padding: 10px 20px;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 3px;
    cursor: pointer;
}

.sufu-btn:hover {
    background: #005177;
}

#sufu-message {
    margin-top: 15px;
    padding: 10px;
    border-radius: 3px;
}

#sufu-message.success {
    background: #d4edda;
    color: #155724;
    border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
}

#sufu-message.error {
    background: #f8d7da;
    color: #721c24;
    border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
}

.sufu-file-item {
    padding: 15px;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
}

.sufu-file-info h4 {
    margin: 0 0 5px 0;
}

.sufu-file-info p {
    margin: 0;
    color: #666;
    font-size: 14px;
}

.sufu-file-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 10px;
}

.sufu-file-actions a,
.sufu-file-actions button {
    padding: 5px 15px;
    text-decoration: none;
    border-radius: 3px;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
}

.sufu-file-actions a {
    background: #0073aa;
    color: #fff;
}

.sufu-file-actions button {
    background: #dc3545;
    color: #fff;
}';
    file_put_contents(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'assets/style.css', $css);
}

if (!file_exists(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'assets/script.js')) {
    $js = 'jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
    
    function loadFiles() {
        $.ajax({
            url: sufu_ajax.ajax_url,
            type: "POST",
            data: {
                action: "sufu_get_files",
                nonce: sufu_ajax.nonce
            },
            success: function(response) {
                if (response.success) {
                    displayFiles(response.data.files);
                }
            }
        });
    }
    
    function displayFiles(files) {
        var html = "";
        if (files.length === 0) {
            html = "<p>No files uploaded yet.</p>";
        } else {
            files.forEach(function(file) {
                html += "<div class=\"sufu-file-item\">";
                html += "<div class=\"sufu-file-info\">";
                html += "<h4>" + file.name + "</h4>";
                html += "<p>Type: " + file.type + " | Size: " + file.size + " | Date: " + file.date + "</p>";
                html += "</div>";
                html += "<div class=\"sufu-file-actions\">";
                html += "<a href=\"" + file.url + "\" target=\"_blank\">View</a>";
                html += "<button class=\"sufu-delete-btn\" data-id=\"" + file.id + "\">Delete</button>";
                html += "</div>";
                html += "</div>";
            });
        }
        $("#sufu-files-list").html(html);
    }
    
    $("#sufu-upload-form").on("submit", function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        var formData = new FormData(this);
        formData.append("action", "sufu_upload_file");
        formData.append("nonce", sufu_ajax.nonce);
        
        $.ajax({
            url: sufu_ajax.ajax_url,
            type: "POST",
            data: formData,
            processData: false,
            contentType: false,
            success: function(response) {
                if (response.success) {
                    $("#sufu-message").removeClass("error").addClass("success").text(response.data.message);
                    $("#sufu-upload-form")[0].reset();
                    loadFiles();
                } else {
                    $("#sufu-message").removeClass("success").addClass("error").text(response.data.message);
                }
            },
            error: function() {
                $("#sufu-message").removeClass("success").addClass("error").text("An error occurred. Please try again.");
            }
        });
    });
    
    $(document).on("click", ".sufu-delete-btn", function() {
        if (!confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this file?")) {
            return;
        }
        
        var fileId = $(this).data("id");
        
        $.ajax({
            url: sufu_ajax.ajax_url,
            type: "POST",
            data: {
                action: "sufu_delete_file",
                nonce: sufu_ajax.nonce,
                file_id: fileId
            },
            success: function(response) {
                if (response.success) {
                    loadFiles();
                } else {
                    alert(response.data.message);
                }
            }
        });
    });
    
    loadFiles();
});';
    file_put_contents(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'assets/script.js', $js);
}
?>
